cases.name: Tip Calculator Self-Gates to Single Shot
cases.goal: Build a polished tip calculator mini-app with bill amount, tip percent, split count, total, and per-person amount.

cases.name: FPS WebGL Emits Layered Stages
cases.goal: Build a first-person 3D arena shooter in the browser: render a real WebGL arena, add core game systems, player camera controls, enemy and player entities, shooting, health, score, and a start button.

cases.name: Forked Island Shooter Plans Additive Work
cases.goal: Add a bridge from the existing island shooter to a city district with traversal, skyline landmarks, and new enemies on the far side.
cases.currentArtifactSummary: Existing installed mini-app: a playable island shooter with a working WebGL world, player movement, enemies, shooting, health, score, and start/reset controls. Extend it; do not rebuild the base game.
